calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-07-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: August 7, 2008

This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioners Helen Chen Wong and Clifford Wong were present in pro per as Guardians ad litem for the minor Gabriel Michael Wong, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioners were placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Gabriel Chia Huei Wong.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
